text:
At the same time the district notifies the comptroller under Section 173.355 (Notice to Comptroller) , the district shall:

(1) notify each affected local governmental jurisdiction of the district’s creation; and

(2) provide each jurisdiction with an adequate map showing the property boundaries of the district.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 173. Intermunicipal Commuter Rail Districts
##### § 173.356 — Notice to Local Governments

At the same time the district notifies the comptroller under Section 173.355 (Notice to Comptroller) , the district shall:

    (1) notify each affected local governmental jurisdiction of the district’s creation; and

    (2) provide each jurisdiction with an adequate map showing the property boundaries of the district.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.04, eff. April 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: At the same time the district notifies the comptroller under Section 173.355 (Notice to Comptroller) , the district shall:
notify each affected local governmental jurisdiction of the district’s creation; and
provide each jurisdiction with an adequate map showing the property boundaries of the district.
